title: BetterBosses
description: Boss improving minecraft mod. Also adds a bunch of other stuff.
body:
Boss improving minecraft mod. Also adds a bunch of other stuff. 

Features:
(Note: words in double quotes are things added in the mod)    
-Custom "Testing" entity.(Will be used for testing boss improvements)    
-Different loot for some mobs. the changes are:    
    -Horses now drop "Horse Meat"    
    -Wither Skeletons now drop "Wither Bones"    
    -Wither now drops "Wither Bones"    
    -The Ender Dragon now drops ender pearls and ender eyes    
    -The Elder Guardian now drops diamonds    
    -"Testing" entity drops "Radioactive Coal"    
-Custom "Tungsten" armor, naturally generating ore, block, nuggets, tools, ingot and plate    
-Custom "Uranium" naturally generating ore, block, nuggets, ingot and plate    
-"Doritos Chip" made by burning wheat    
-"Steakchop", "Chicksteak", "Porkchick" custom meat    
-"Steakchop Souvlaki", "Chicksteak Souvlaki", "Porkchick Souvlaki", "Pork Souvlaki", "Steak     Souvlaki" and "Chicken Souvlaki" custom souvlaki    
-"Lucta Chocolate bar" custom chocolate bar    
-"Raw Horse Meat" and "Horse Meat" custom meat    
-"Wither Bone" custom bone for wither entities    
-"Radioactive Coal" and "Radioactive Charcoal" custom fuels    
-"Bread slice" and "Cake Slice" custom slices    
-"Milk Cardler" ("Cheese Maker" in game) used to make "Cheese"    
-"Cheese" and "Feta" custom cheeses    
-"Dark Oak Chest", "Spruce Chest", "Jungle Chest", "Birch Chest" and "Acacia Chest" custom chests    
-"Withered Obsidian" custom obsidian    
-4 custom tabs for BetterBosses Items, Blocks, Food and Tools    
-A lot of changes to the wither fight!    

You may use this mod in you modpack.
